speaker: KING
text: Makes the remembrance dear. Well, call him hither.

text: All repetition. Let him not ask our pardon.

speaker: KING

speaker: KING

speaker: KING
text: Like a remorseful pardon slowly carried,

speaker: KING
text: To the great sender turns a sour offense,

speaker: KING
text: Crying “That’s good that’s gone!” Our rash faults

speaker: KING
text: Make trivial price of serious things we have,

speaker: KING
text: Not knowing them until we know their grave.

speaker: KING
text: Oft our displeasures, to ourselves unjust,

speaker: KING
text: Destroy our friends and after weep their dust.

speaker: KING

speaker: KING
text: While shameful hate sleeps out the afternoon.

speaker: KING
text: Be this sweet Helen’s knell, and now forget her.

text: If it appear not plain and prove untrue,

speaker: HELEN
text: Deadly divorce step between me and you.—

speaker: HELEN
text: O my dear mother, do I see you living?

speaker: LAFEW
text: Mine eyes smell onions. I shall weep anon.—

speaker: LAFEW
text:
To
                 
                Parolles
                .
               Good Tom Drum, lend me a handkercher.

speaker: LAFEW
text: So, I thank thee. Wait on me home.

speaker: LAFEW
text: I’ll make sport with thee. Let thy courtesies alone.

speaker: LAFEW
text: They are scurvy ones.

speaker: KING
text: Let us from point to point this story know,

speaker: KING
text: To make the even truth in pleasure flow.

speaker: KING
text:
To
                 
                Diana
                .
                 
              If thou be’st yet a fresh uncroppèd flower,

speaker: KING
text: Choose thou thy husband, and I’ll pay thy dower.

speaker: KING
text: For I can guess that by thy honest aid

speaker: KING
text: Thou kept’st a wife herself, thyself a maid.

speaker: KING
text: Of that and all the progress more and less,

speaker: KING
text: Resolvedly more leisure shall express.

speaker: KING
text: All yet seems well, and if it end so meet,

speaker: KING
text: The bitter past, more welcome is the sweet.
